prompt: Create a photorealistic portrait of an adult East Asian woman with short light-brown bob hair with wispy bangs, standing indoors at night beside large floor-to-ceiling apartment windows overlooking blurred city lights. She faces the camera with a gentle confident smile, soft eye contact, and a relaxed fashion-model pose, one hand lightly touching the shoulder strap area and the other holding the edge of an oversized chunky knit cardigan. She wears a white asymmetrical one-piece cutout swimsuit with oval torso openings and high-cut sides layered under a loose cream cable-knit cardigan slipping off the shoulders. The composition is a vertical three-quarter body portrait from head to upper thighs, centered subject, natural skin texture, glossy eyes, subtle makeup, warm indoor lighting, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh city lights outside the dark windows, modern apartment interior with a pale window ledge and a beige lounge chair in the background. Use a high-end editorial photography style, realistic anatomy, tasteful glamour, warm color grading, 50mm lens look, soft shadows, crisp focus on the face and outfit, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic portrait of an adult East Asian woman with short light-brown bob hair with wispy bangs, standing indoors at night beside large floor-to-ceiling apartment windows overlooking blurred city lights. She faces the camera with a gentle confident smile, soft eye contact, and a relaxed fashion-model pose, one hand lightly touching the shoulder strap area and the other holding the edge of an oversized chunky knit cardigan. She wears a white asymmetrical one-piece cutout swimsuit with oval torso openings and high-cut sides layered under a loose cream cable-knit cardigan slipping off the shoulders. The composition is a vertical three-quarter body portrait from head to upper thighs, centered subject, natural skin texture, glossy eyes, subtle makeup, warm indoor lighting, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh city lights outside the dark windows, modern apartment interior with a pale window ledge and a beige lounge chair in the background. Use a high-end editorial photography style, realistic anatomy, tasteful glamour, warm color grading, 50mm lens look, soft shadows, crisp focus on the face and outfit, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptZh: 创作一张逼真的肖像，主角是一位东亚成年女性，留着 带有空气刘海的浅棕色短波波头，夜晚站在室内，身旁是大大的落地窗，窗外是模糊的城市灯光。她面向镜头，带着自信温柔的微笑，眼神柔和，姿态如时尚模特般放松，一只手轻轻触碰肩带区域，另一只手抓着一件超大粗棒针织开衫的边缘。她穿着 一件白色不对称连体镂空泳衣，躯干处有椭圆形开口，侧面高开叉，外搭 一件从肩部滑落的宽松米色麻花针织开衫。构图为垂直的三分之二身长肖像，从头部到大腿上部，主体居中，皮肤纹理自然，双眼明亮，妆容精致，室内暖光，浅景深，窗外是奶油般虚化的城市灯光，背景为现代公寓室内，配有浅色窗台和米色休闲椅。采用高端杂志摄影风格，解剖结构真实，格调高雅，暖色调处理，50mm 镜头效果，柔和阴影，面部和服装焦点清晰，无文字，无水印，无其他人物。
